stockMarket.summary: Global markets face intense volatility as US-Iran tensions escalate. Oil prices surged ~7% (Brent ~$108-109/bbl, WTI ~$107/bbl) following President Trump's hawkish remarks about 'finishing the job' against Iran. Markets are reacting to 'warflation' fears and potential supply chain disruptions due to the Strait of Hormuz closure concerns.
notableMoves: Oil surge: Brent and WTI rose >7% today.
Market sentiment: Global stock indices (Nikkei, Kospi, FTSE) are down; US futures pointing lower.
Economic impact: Inflationary pressures rising ('warflation'); safe-haven demand boosting the US Dollar.

exhibitions: Several Eternities in a Day (Hammer Museum, Apr 5 - Aug 23)
An Ode to Things (EMST Athens, through Sept 30)
The Whitney Biennial 2026 (Whitney Museum, through Aug 23)
